summary.boundary: Exact queue identity is verified from decoded local runtime evidence. DOS evidence currently anchors combat scene availability and save probes, not original turn-by-turn combat equivalence.

checks.note: Runtime probe targets Caloris GEO 017 event 7.
Event 7 queues decoded monster id 52, RAM WARRIOR.
A local DOS liveplay combat-input capture exists.
Pre/post combat save probes decode local party records.
Current Python combat scaffold resolves the queued encounter deterministically.

confidence.basis: Constant SETUP_MONSTER operand resolves locally to MON0CHA id 52 in the generated source-runtime probe.
Local DOS screenshots and saves are hashed; this pass does not OCR combat text or decode all save-state combat flags.
